description_long: This object is a sleek, modern passenger jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of low-mounted, swept-back wings. The wings are equipped with small winglets at their tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two turbofan engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, just below a prominent T-tail configuration, which features a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The airplane has a tricycle landing gear arrangement, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, featuring a multi-windowed, enclosed design typical of commercial jets.
description: A modern passenger jet with low, swept-back wings, rear-mounted engines, and a T-tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a forward, enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit windows, and the symmetrical spread of the low-mounted wings with visible winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, rear-mounted twin engines, T-tail, and the tricycle landing gear with the nose gear extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin rear-mounted engines, the T-tail configuration, and the full span of the wings with winglets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other profile of the fuselage, engines, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and small upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of a multi-seat commercial jet.
